description: MCP server for the Avanan MSP SmartAPI — manage child MSPs, users, tenants, licenses, and usage.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/avanan-legacy-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Application ID provided by Avanan Support (x-av-app-id)
environmentVariables.name: AVANAN_APP_ID

environmentVariables.description: Token from the Avanan auth handshake (x-av-token)
environmentVariables.name: AVANAN_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Shared secret used to compute the x-av-sig HMAC
environmentVariables.name: AVANAN_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: API region: us, eu, ca, or ap (defaults to JWT region claim, then us)
environmentVariables.name: AVANAN_REGION

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode: 'stdio' for local CLI use, 'http' for gateway hosting
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Avanan MSP (Legacy SmartAPI)
